_comment: Golden vector for ava-saevm-blocks tests/block_hash_golden.rs (specs/11 §4.1). A SAE block is a standard Ethereum block: block_hash = keccak256(RLP(header)). Frozen from the fixed reference_block() built with reth/alloy SealedBlock::seal_slow; the `Root` (state_root) field carries the SAE-reinterpreted settled-ancestor post-exec state root (layout-identical to a stock header). Guards that the reth-based header layout/hashing path stays stable; exact Go/geth byte parity is asserted by the M7.29 differential.
